movies.original_title: สัปเหร่อ 2 โลกหลังความตาย
movies.overview: Following the passing of Baikaow and Sak, life in the village slowly returns to normal. This calm is disrupted when Grandma Joy is suddenly struck by lightning and miraculously revives.
movies.tagline: When the living haven't found closure, the dead cannot move on.
movies.title: The Undertaker 2: Afterlife

movies.original_title: ราคี
movies.overview: When Malee, a young woman with a dark past, is drawn by fate to an apartment where she must confront haunting memories from her childhood, she encounters Pran, a botanist, a tea blending master, and the founder of a Thai floral tea brand.
movies.tagline: One night, one stain written into a lifetime.
movies.title: The Stain

movies.original_title: เลือดรักนักฆ่า
movies.overview: Hunted for her rare blood type, a caged woman vows to fight alongside the assassin she loves to protect their future when an old enemy resurfaces.
movies.title: My Dearest Assassin

movies.original_title: ครัวสาว
movies.overview: Sao, a talented cook, accidentally meets the man who took advantage of her in the past. She sets her revenge plan in motion using her cooking skill to achieve a rather unexpected result.
movies.title: Morte Cucina

movies.original_title: รักโคตร ๆ โหดอย่างมึง 1
movies.overview: Day seeks revenge on Itt for a plan that led to his brother Night's assault, but their twisted dynamic sparks unexpected feelings.
movies.title: Love Syndrome: The Beginning

movies.original_title: โกยเถอะเกย์
movies.overview: Aud and Yai, a gay couple in a big city, move to a remote town and reopen an old gas station. Yai has an affair with a local woman and Aud plots murder. Neither man knows the gas station is haunted and the spirits have plans of their own.
movies.tagline: The story of a bizarre secret, when love is in the toilet.
movies.title: Ghost Station

movies.original_title: พนอ
movies.overview: Born during an ancient village ritual, Panor faces isolation as mysterious misfortunes plague those around her. She must uncover the truth behind the dark curse that has haunted her since birth.
movies.tagline: Get ready for the origin of the art of the devil.
movies.title: Panor

movies.original_title: กล่องผีสุ่มวิญญาณ
movies.overview: A group of friends stumbles upon an ancient board game hidden in a remote temple. Once the die is cast, a vengeful spirit is unleashed, turning the game into a deadly trap. To survive, they must figure out how to end it before they become its next victims.
movies.tagline: Roll the dice. Stay alive. Till sunrise.
movies.title: Ghost Board

movies.original_title: ปัง
movies.overview: Follows a ruthless hitman who, after narrowly escaping a fatal attempt on his life, betrays his gang in an effort to find forgiveness but ends up becoming a target himself.
movies.tagline: Once a killer, now the mark.
movies.title: Bang

movies.original_title: โกฮัง..หัวใจโกโฮม
movies.overview: The bonds between humans and animals following a stray dog named Gohan as it moves through life with temporary owners over a decade, through good times and bad times, joy and sorrow, hellos and goodbyes.
movies.tagline: One stray dog, three owners, comes the love that lasts fur-ever.
movies.title: Gohan

movies.original_title: เส้นตาย สายลวง
movies.overview: Three women fall prey to a ruthless phone scam. To settle the score, they'll take on the criminal network that stole their money — and their dignity.
movies.tagline: When the victim becomes the hunter. When the law fails it's time to reclaim.
movies.title: The Red Line

movies.original_title: จันดารา
movies.overview: Jan is a boy growing up in 1930s Siam in a wealthy, dysfunctional family where sex has a huge impact on everyone's lives. Jan is viewed by his father as cursed, since his mother died giving birth to him.
movies.title: Jan Dara

movies.original_title: ราก เรื้อ รัง
movies.overview: A family is deciding whether to cure their mother's illness through medicine or superstition.
movies.title: The Melting Faith

movies.original_title: องค์บาก
movies.overview: When the head of a statue sacred to a village is stolen, a young martial artist goes to the big city and finds himself taking on the underworld to retrieve it.
movies.tagline: No computer graphics. No stunt doubles. No wires.
movies.title: Ong-Bak

movies.original_title: กิ่งแก้ว
movies.overview: After a child in her care dies, a young woman is executed for a crime she didn't commit. Now, her spirit seeks justice for her wrongful death.
movies.title: King Kaew

movies.original_title: มนต์รักวัวชน
movies.overview: Kaikwaed, a young man from the Southern part of Thailand, grew up on the bull-fighting arena despite his farmer-father's objection.
movies.tagline: Bullfighting rearer and gambler are real close. Try to be a bull rearer, not a gambler.
movies.title: Love Battle vs Bullfighting

movies.original_title: ร่างทรง
movies.overview: A shaman's family learn that their goddess is supposedly controlling one of them. However, their lives take a frightening turn when they realise the goddess has nothing to do with the possession.
movies.tagline: A story about shamanism in Thailand.
movies.title: The Medium

movies.original_title: OMG! รักจังวะ..ผิดจังหวะ
movies.overview: Over the years, awkward Guy keeps falling for confident June in the wrong places at the wrong times, leading him to believe fate is playing tricks on them.
movies.tagline: A love story… that keeps happening in the wrong place... at the wrong time.
movies.title: OMG! Oh My Girl

movies.original_title: พนักงานใหม่ (โปรดรับไว้พิจารณา)
movies.overview: Working in HR at a challenging company, Fren interviews young new hires and is secretly one month pregnant, grappling with the decision to have a child in difficult circumstances.
movies.tagline: We are all new recruits in this world.
movies.title: Human Resource

movies.original_title: TERRAZZO
movies.title: TERRAZZO

tv_shows.name: Club Friday
tv_shows.original_name: Club Friday
tv_shows.overview: Based on a Thai radio show that gives love advice to callers, this series dramatizes stories of infidelity, love triangles, sexual identity and more.

seasons.name: Club Friday 3 - Three Love Three Life
Club Friday 9
seasons.overview: This is a series of short stories based on a radio program called "Club Friday", where people call in to tell their stories. The stories told are a true account of their life. Each series has a different story and cast. Season nine's theme is "To Love Isn't to Die".

seasons.name: Club Friday 10
seasons.overview: This series of short stories is based on a radio show called "Good Friday Club", where people call in to tell their stories. This season is about unfaithful love.

seasons.name: Club Friday 11
seasons.overview: "Club Friday 11" is a series of true stories about messy love.

seasons.name: Club Friday 12: Uncharted Love
seasons.overview: "Club Friday 12" is a collection of short series about uncharted, hidden love.

seasons.name: Club Friday 13: Love Seasons Celebration
seasons.overview: Club Friday 13 is a collection of stories about love—the good and the bad—in times of celebration.

seasons.name: Club Friday 14: Love And Belief
seasons.overview: The most popular series based on the true story of love, the most dramatic that calls to tears, with the concept of morality. and law of karma along the way to reflect the real life of human beings It has been continuously popular for more than 10 years with 14 seasons, including more than 100 stories, guaranteed by quality with many prestigious awards. This year the 14th season has arrived: Club Friday The Series 14 Love and Belief. Bringing stories of love and belief from real life people in modern times who believe in various stories that will affect love, causing it to come crashing down. Because one chooses to believe in everything too much, but does not choose to believe in their own heart. Featuring leading quality actors in Thailand.

seasons.name: Club Friday 16: Hot Love Issue
seasons.overview: An anthology series depicting messy interpersonal situations taken from the "Club Friday" radio programme.

seasons.name: Club Friday 17: Theory of Love
seasons.overview:
No theory works for every love.

Love theories have been discussed and practiced over time. Some find them transformative, others ineffective due to relationship complexities. The series asks: Can any single theory truly apply to every kind of love in today’s evolving world?

seasons.name: Club Friday 18: Love Status
seasons.overview: An exploration of different kinds of relationship and dating red flags in this era.

seasons.overview: A year after their fateful trip, P has built a new life—but when Pan returns to Japan with someone new, old feelings stir and winter begins to shift.

tv_shows.tagline: Was it chance that we met? Or is it a miracle?

seasons.name: Specials

seasons.name: Part One

seasons.name: Part Two
seasons.overview: Three friends navigate painful secrets, spiritual mysteries, and lonely hearts as they find love with medical students against all odds

tv_shows.name: I Can See Your Voice Thailand
tv_shows.original_name: นักร้องซ่อนแอบ
tv_shows.overview: Thailand version of the reality singing competition where g celebrities must correctly guess a real singer, based on appearance and a few hints only.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: Presented with a group of seven "mystery singers" identified only by their occupation, a guest artist must attempt to eliminate bad singers from the group without ever hearing them sing, assisted by clues and a celebrity panel over the course of four rounds. At the end of the game, the last remaining mystery singer is revealed as either good or bad by means of a duet between them and one of the guest artists.

seasons.name: Season 4
seasons.overview:
The fourth season of the mystery music game show I Can See Your Voice Thailand will air November 4, 2020, on Workpoint TV. I Can See Your Voice Thailand is the Thai adaption of the South Korean program of the same name. The show is hosted by Kan Kantathavorn and Somkiat Chanphram.

However, due to the COVID-19 pandemic in Thailand, episodes will continue filming but with no audience admitted with enhanced COVID-19 safety protocols being in effect.

seasons.name: Festival
seasons.overview: For this season, under the original format, the guest artist can eliminate one or two mystery singers after each round. The game concludes with the last mystery singer standing that depends on outcome of a duet performance with a guest artist.

seasons.name: TPOP
seasons.overview: T-pop artists are presented with six singers whose singing abilities are a mystery. Through a series of four rounds, the guest artist is given new information that may or may not help them eliminate potential bad singers. In the end, the artist will learn if their final pick is in fact a good singer when they perform a duet with them.

tv_shows.name: Chasing Love
tv_shows.original_name: พี่เองก็ลำบาก
tv_shows.overview:
Song, a hot nerd and food researcher, arranged a one-night stand with a mysterious woman under a strict condition: no strings attached. However, the other party broke the terms, asking for an emotional connection. Song ended the steamy encounter and walked away.

But the world really is round. That woman turned out to be Piangrawin—the daughter of the president of the company where Song worked. And Piangrawin wasn’t letting go easily. She pursued her with puppy-like devotion, entangling Song's heart and routine with reckless charm. She even claimed she’d already named their future child.

tv_shows.name: Suea Chani Keng
tv_shows.original_name: เสือ ชะนี เก้ง
tv_shows.overview: Three BFFs live in the same condominium building and face life and love together. Tum, a playboy photographer who doesn’t believe in true love because his girlfriend left him with a luxury condominium to pay off alone. Oil, Tum’s friend, offers to help him find a roommate to share the rent. Turns out the new roommate is Cheetah aka Chatree, Tum’s gay friend who used to be secretly in love with him. Tum cut off his friendship with Cheetah a long time ago because Cheetah tricked him to believe that he was straight.

seasons.name: Specials
seasons.overview: This series is about three friends retelling their first year in college together. Chatri tries to stay in the closet due to his military general father; Oil is a rich and arrogant woman who thinks she is the best, and Tum is a charming Casanova who wants to go to the big city and meet girls. When Oil falls for Chatri, Chatri falls for Tum, and Tum falls for beautiful girls in college, drama and comedy unfolds.

last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 5
last_episode_to_air.overview: Moved by Runch's actions during a confrontation, Neen gives her another chance. Undeterred, Gingkamol relentlessly schemes to tear the two apart.

tv_shows.name: In Love Forever
tv_shows.original_name: วาดฝันวันวิวาห์
tv_shows.overview:
After a bitter divorce caused by family pressure and emotional manipulation, successful lawyer Runchlaphat and outspoken Gen-Z heiress Peeracha want nothing to do with each other. But when a high-stakes business opportunity requires them to appear as a happily married couple, the former lovers are forced back under the same roof.

As they struggle to maintain the illusion, unresolved feelings and painful memories begin to resurface. Meanwhile, Runchlaphat’s controlling mother, Gingkamol, remains determined to keep Peeracha out of the family at all costs. Surrounded by deception, pride, and lingering desire, the ex-wives find themselves trapped between the love they once shared and the wounds they never healed.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: Still drawn to each other but torn apart by Runch's mother, two women must pretend they're still happily married to close a high-stakes business deal.

tv_shows.tagline: The real challenge begins after 'I do.'
